prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次约5662→10070→11185→12603→16593，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约10931名；2025年基准约16593名，较2024年后移约3990 名，后移幅度明显加大；本省物理类/理科计划2021年12人、2022年12人、2023年10人、2024年11人、2025年13人；2026年计划11人，较2025年缩招约15. 4%，缩招对竞争有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第79名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第82→2026年第79），学校综合实力持续增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（考研名师学历争议），可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第39（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2023年曾出现小语种专业位次下降的投档异常信号；外国语言文学A+，为全国顶尖水平，与该校外语类、翻译类、外交学等招生专业高度匹配，对相关专业报 考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中，电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等理工科专业社会热度高， 可能吸引更多物理类考生报考北外；本省2026年考生总数约45.1万，较2025年略降，物理类估算约31.1万人（较2025年32.1万略降约3%），考生规模小幅缩减，较2024年465分略降，卷面难度变化不大；北京外国语大学位于北京，在安徽省招生占比约2.8%（2025年），属于跨省招生，无显著地域偏好优 势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势、2026年计划缩招约15.4%加剧竞争、理工科专业热度高吸引更多物理类考生报考，以及本省考生规模略降等因素，在2025 年基准16593名基础上预计竞争略有缓和但缩招效应部分抵消后移趋势；预测最低位次约15032名，区间14532–15532名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science has been approximately 5662 → 10070 → 11185 → 12603 → 16593, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10,931 places over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 16,593, a backward shift of about 3,990 places compared to 2024, with a significantly increased magnitude; the provincial Physics Category/Science enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 11, a reduction of about 15.4% compared to 2025, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 79th, with a steady upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021 → 79th in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (postgraduate entrance exam master's degree controversy), which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 39th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining rankings for minor language majors; Foreign Language and Literature is A+, at the national top level, highly matching the school's foreign language, translation, diplomacy and other enrollment majors, strongly attracting applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other science and engineering majors have high social popularity, potentially attracting more Physics Category candidates to apply to BFSU; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 451,000, slightly lower than 2025, with Physics Category estimated at about 311,000 (slightly down about 3% from 321,000 in 2025), a slight reduction in candidate scale; compared to 2024's 465 points, slightly lower, with little change in exam difficulty; Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, with about 2.8% of enrollment in Anhui Province (2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 15.4% intensifying competition, the high popularity of science and engineering majors attracting more Physics Category candidates, and the slight decrease in the provincial candidate scale, based on the 2025 baseline of 16,593, competition is expected to ease slightly but the reduction effect partially offsets the backward trend; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15,032, with a range of 14,532–15,532.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14,532–15,532, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 14,500), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship foreign language majors; for rankings near the upper limit (around 15,500), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第79名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第82→2026年第79），学校综合实力持续增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（考研名师学历争议），可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第39（较热），短视频曝光 量中等偏上；2023年曾出现小语种专业位次下降的投档异常信号；外国语言文学A+，为全国顶尖水平，与该校外语类、翻译类、外交学等招生专业高度匹配，对 相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业中，法学（分化观望）、汉语言文学（推荐）、国际经济与贸易（分化观望）等文科专业社会热度分化；外 语类专业（一般观望）热度平稳；本省2026年考生总数约45.1万，历史类估算约13.98万人（较2025年14.14万略降约1.1%），考生规模小幅缩减，较2024年462分上升15分，显示竞争略有加剧；北京外国语大学位于北京，在安徽省招生占比约2.8%（2025年），属于跨省招生，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近3年前移趋势（竞争加剧）、2026年计划缩招15%进一步加剧竞争、，以及本省考生规模略降但幅度有限等因素， 在2025年基准1441名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约1331名，区间998–1664名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 883→2282→1726→1566→1441, overall significant fluctuation: a large backward shift in 2022 (2282) followed by a year-by-year recovery, with a forward trend in the last 3 years (ranking number decreasing), cumulative forward shift of about 841 places; 2025 baseline approximately 1441; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan: 11 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 20 in 2025; 2026 plan 17, a 15% reduction from 2025, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 79th in 2026, with a steady upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021→79th in 2026), continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (postgraduate entrance exam master's degree controversy), which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 39th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining rankings for minor language majors; Foreign Language and Literature A+, at the national top level, highly matching the university's foreign language, translation, diplomacy and other enrollment majors, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among history category enrollment majors, law (differentiation wait-and-see), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), International Economics and Trade (differentiation wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors have differentiated social popularity; foreign language majors (general wait-and-see) have stable popularity; provincial total number of examinees in 2026 approximately 451,000, history category estimated about 139,800 (slightly down about 1.1% from 2025's 141,400), examinee scale slightly reduced, up 15 points from 2024's 462 points, indicating slightly intensified competition; Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, with enrollment proportion in Anhui province about 2.8% (2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings in the last 3 years (intensified competition), the 15% enrollment reduction in 2026 further intensifying competition, and the slight but limited reduction in provincial examinee scale, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1441; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1331, range 998–1664.
